title: Segmentation fault on the Verilated model
body:
Sorry but I have not got enough time to minimize the example. I prefer to upload the overall example here first and minimize it later if this issue cannot be identified with this large example. The build does not take a long time (3 minutes to generate the C++ and 8 minutes to compile them using 16 threads).

Verilator 5.017 devel rev v5.014-172-g66cd08960
Ubuntu 20.04

*May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?*
I tried to identify the issue but obviously I didn't succeed. I'm glad to fix it with some help.

This is a single-core XiangShan and it causes segmentation fault during the initial/reset cycles. I built the model with `-g` enabled today (it takes hours to build). Here is the output:
```C++
Thread 1 "emu" received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
0x00000000038aeaca in VSimTop___024root___stl_sequent__TOP__17 (vlSelf=0x7ffff6365100) at VSimTop___024root__DepSet_hd5918264__90__Slow.cpp:4386
4386                = vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__frontend__DOT__bpu__DOT__predictors__DOT__ftb__DOT__ftbBank__DOT__ftb__DOT__array_0__DOT__array_0_3_ext__DOT__RW0_random[0U];
(gdb) where
#0  0x00000000038aeaca in VSimTop___024root___stl_sequent__TOP__17 (vlSelf=0x7ffff6365100) at VSimTop___024root__DepSet_hd5918264__90__Slow.cpp:4386
#1  0x0000000000509a77 in VSimTop___024root___eval_stl (vlSelf=0x7ffff6365100) at VSimTop___024root__DepSet_hd5918264__219__Slow.cpp:2775
#2  0x00000000004bf1da in VSimTop___024root___eval_settle (vlSelf=0x7ffff6365100) at VSimTop___024root__DepSet_hd5918264__74__Slow.cpp:1026
#3  0x0000000000433f7c in VSimTop::eval_step (this=0xb823480) at VSimTop.cpp:69
#4  0x000000000041a50b in VSimTop::eval (this=0x7ffff63cc5e0) at ./VSimTop.h:67
#5  Emulator::reset_ncycles (this=0xb823360, cycles=10) at /home/xuyinan/xs/XiangShan/difftest/src/test/csrc/verilator/emu.cpp:550
#6  0x0000000000418d9d in Emulator::Emulator (this=0xb823360, argc=3, argv=0x7fffffffe018) at /home/xuyinan/xs/XiangShan/difftest/src/test/csrc/verilator/emu.cpp:348
#7  0x00000000004118fb in main (argc=0, argv=0x7fffffffe018) at /home/xuyinan/xs/XiangShan/difftest/src/test/csrc/common/main.cpp:41
(gdb)
```

Here is the corresponding C++ code:
```
// build/emu-compile/VSimTop___024root__DepSet_hd5918264__90__Slow.cpp

 4384     } else {
 4385         vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__frontend__DOT__bpu__DOT__predictors__DOT__ftb__DOT__ftbBank__DOT__ftb__DOT___array_0_RW0_rdata[0U]
 4386             = vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__frontend__DOT__bpu__DOT__predictors__DOT__ftb__DOT__ftbBank__DOT__ftb__DOT__array_0__DOT__array_0_3_ext__DOT__RW0_random[0U];
 4387         vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__frontend__DOT__bpu__DOT__predictors__DOT__ftb__DOT__ftbBank__DOT__ftb__DOT___array_0_RW0_rdata[1U]
 4388             = vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__frontend__DOT__bpu__DOT__predictors__DOT__ftb__DOT__ftbBank__DOT__ftb__DOT__array_0__DOT__array_0_3_ext__DOT__RW0_random[1U];
 4389         vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__frontend__DOT__bpu__DOT__predictors__DOT__ftb__DOT__ftbBank__DOT__ftb__DOT___array_0_RW0_rdata[2U]
 4390             = (0x3ffffU & vlSelf->SimTop__DOT__l_soc__DOT__core_with_l2__DOT__core__DOT__frontend__DOT__bpu__DOT__predictors__DOT__ftb__DOT__ftbBank__DOT__ftb__DOT__array_0__DOT__array_0_3_ext__DOT__RW0_random[2U]);
 4391     }
```

Here I attach the build environment without compiled files because they are too large to upload. It should have the same C++ sources as generated by the following commands.

```
export NOOP_HOME=/path/to/case
make emu -jN EMU_TRACE=1
./build/emu -i ./Makefile --no-diff
```

Output looks like
```
➜  case_segmentation_fault ./build/emu -i ./Makefile --no-diff
emu compiled at Oct 13 2023, 22:48:27
Using simulated 32768B flash
isWriteFetchToIBufferTable0 = 0
isWriteIfuWbToFtqTable0 = 0
isWriteFTQTable0 = 0
isWriteBankConflictTable0 = 0
depth0 = 32
enableDynamicPrefetcher0 = 1
StoreWaitThreshold_0 = 0
nMaxPrefetchEntry0 = 14
isWriteL1MissQMissTable0 = 0
isWriteLoadMissTable0 = 0
isFirstHitWrite0 = 0
isWriteLoadAccessTable0 = 0
isWriteL2TlbPrefetchTable0 = 0
isWriteL1TlbTable0 = 0
isWritePageCacheTable0 = 0
isWritePTWTable0 = 0
isWriteL2TlbMissQueueTable0 = 0
always_update0 = 1
l1_stride_ratio0 = 2
l2_stride_ratio0 = 5
l2DepthRatio0 = 2
l3DepthRatio0 = 3
enableL3StreamPrefetch0 = 0
enableL1StreamPrefetcher0 = 1
ColdDownThreshold_0 = 12
ForceWriteUpper_0 = 60
ForceWriteLower_0 = 55
StoreBufferThreshold_0 = 7
StoreBufferBase_0 = 4
CorrectMissTrain0 = 0
isWriteInstInfoTable0 = 0
[1]    1496177 segmentation fault (core dumped)  ./build/emu -i ./Makefile --no-diff
```

With gdb will see the abortion is due to the previous lines in the verilated model.
